response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with direct hands-on work in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) at multiple Berlin-based companies. Current role at re:cinq explicitly involves AI agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, matching the AI agent development requirement. Strong polyglot background (TypeScript, Java, DLang, C++, Python-adjacent), database experience (MongoDB, MySQL, SQL), Docker/Kubernetes exposure, and a clear emphasis on testing/TDD and software craftsmanship align tightly with the role.
strengths: Direct AI agent and MCP infrastructure experience at current role matches a key requirement
Deep full-stack expertise with TypeScript/Node.js/React plus polyglot range (Java, DLang, C++)
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, pairing, CI/CD, workshops on testing)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned in the resume
Kotlin not listed; only Java for secondary backend services
Located in Lagos, Nigeria — potential timezone/relocation considerations versus Berlin-based teams
